match: ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
fix: Peer dependency conflict. Try: npm install --legacy-peer-deps
Module not found. Try: npm install <module-name>
No package.json found. Run: npm init -y
Permission error. Do NOT use sudo with npm. Fix permissions: https://docs.npmjs.com/resolving-eacces-permissions-errors-when-installing-packages-globally
Package not found on npm registry. Check the package name for typos.
Requested version doesn't exist. Check available versions: npm view <package> versions
Package is deprecated. Check for an alternative or newer version.
Network error. Check your internet connection. If behind a proxy: npm config set proxy http://proxy:port
